title: Lookup exact-one by Guid
description: Runs the new lookup series on the same generated data for current Polar.DB and SQLite. Pinned Polar.DB NuGet targets are intentionally excluded because the series uses new lookup APIs.

dataset.notes: Synthetic deterministic lookup dataset generated by adapters from the same manifest.

workload.notes: exact-one expects exactly one row; all-matching validates the full duplicate range.

fairness.notes: Shared intent; SQLite maps it to conservative durable-ish PRAGMA settings, PolarDB keeps its current adapter defaults.

runs.notes: One warmup and three measured runs for lookup comparison.
